title: Business Breakfast | Stock/Share Market News | 25th March 2026 | TV5 Money Live

recommendations.note: Hold at ~40% loss; summer demand and electronics/domestic-manufacturing focus over next 1-2 quarters; not a stock to sell now.
recommendations.detail: Hold for now; we're moving into summer so demand can rise again, and focus on electronics/domestic manufacturing increases over next 1-2 quarters. Not a stock to sell at this time. If bought for trading, book profit on recovery/rallies.

recommendations.note: Hold at ~40% loss; fundamentally strong, good order book; Adani took it over; only infra-sector dullness weighs.
recommendations.detail: Renamed Cem India Projects Ltd (the caller's 'Sem India'). Fundamentally strong, good order book/pipeline; Adani took over the company; only sector impact (infra has no fancy) weighs. Hold.

recommendations.stock: HDFC Gold ETF FoF / HDFC Silver ETF FoF
recommendations.note: Continue the SIP for the long term; gold/silver/precious metals are a good, important asset class. No doubt.
recommendations.detail: SIP ~Rs 6,000/mo, ~Rs 5,000 down. Continue for the long term; precious metals are an important asset class. Definitely continue, no need for doubt.

recommendations.note: Hold; resilient/strong. Fresh buying only on a sharp dip - it's a hype stock, don't rush.
recommendations.detail: Very resilient, showing strength even in this market. Hold; fresh buying only when a sharp dip comes - it's a hype stock, no need to rush and buy in a hurry.

recommendations.note: Accumulate when it comes close to 100; will emerge as a stronger stock but a hype/80-PE stock, not cheap.
recommendations.detail: Will emerge as one of the stronger stocks (bounces from lows even post-QIP; good turnover/profitability vs other retailers). Hype stock, not cheap (80 PE); accumulate close to 100.

recommendations.note: Hold at ~26% loss; good bet, rarely this cheap (~11x vs usual 10x); startup-funding optionality despite weak placements.
recommendations.detail: Consistently weak but has advantage of many startup/skill fundings. Unemployment rising hurts placements, stock below 1000; but a good bet and rarely available closer to 10x (now ~11x). Definitely hold.

recommendations.note: Don't sell at 79-80; bold investors accumulate/average. Value now showing - emerging large HFC (Rs 10,000 cr+, ~Rs 2,000 cr+ profit).
recommendations.detail: At 39% loss; IPO-hype victims stuck even after averaging. But value now showing after correction and a couple quarters' results - emerging as larger HFC doing Rs 10,000 cr+ with ~Rs 2,000 cr+ profit. Don't sell at 79-80 even at 52-week low; bold investors accumulate/average slowly.

recommendations.note: Buy-on-dips; add slowly with a long-term horizon; submarine demand coming. Not an immediate multibagger.
recommendations.detail: Already held at ~3,300. Can be added slowly but need long-term horizon; not an immediate multibagger. Submarine demand coming. Definitely a buy-on-dips stock; add on dips.

recommendations.note: Add slowly before the demerger record date; post-demerger add again based on resulting entities (e.g. silver).
recommendations.detail: Record date for the demerger has come; add slowly before the record date. After the demerger completes, add again depending on the resulting different companies (e.g. silver).

recommendations.note: Hold at current levels even at a loss; one of few cos with ~50%-plus margins; some trading activity.
recommendations.detail: Industrial-gases company; one of the few cos screening 50%-plus margins (though uncertain if truly that much). Some trading activity; can be held at current levels even if at a loss.

recommendations.note: Hold at ~30% loss; PV cos on back foot but good EV presence; likely a short-lived correction.
recommendations.detail: Passenger-vehicle companies on back foot now, but Tata Motors has good EV presence from before; likely a short-lived correction. Hold for the present.

recommendations.note: Hold at ~30% loss; recovered ~20-25% this month, into an uptrend.
recommendations.detail: This month recovered ~20-25%; stock has come a bit into an uptrend. Hold for now (was possibly 50% down earlier).

recommendations.note: Hold; corrected with the market; can reach ~200 over a 1-2 year horizon.
recommendations.detail: Current price 118 vs Rs 202 buy. Corrected in the market correction; hold for now. With a 1-2 year horizon it can come to 200 and go up too.

recommendations.note: Hold as of now; not the time to exit (at ~11% loss).
recommendations.detail: Among caller's stocks (also Devyani International, NTPC Green): not the time to exit yet. Bharat Coking Coal and these - hold as of now; exit weaker stocks once markets recover toward ~24,000.

recommendations.note: Exit all weaker stocks when markets recover and come closer to the 24,000 level.
recommendations.detail: When markets recover a bit and come closer to the 24,000 level, exit all the weaker stocks (advice given against caller's mixed portfolio of weak/good stocks).

recommendations.note: Risky for PF/retirement money; only with risk appetite and a 5-year-plus horizon; otherwise don't disturb it.
recommendations.detail: Caller wants to put 50% of ~Rs 10 lakh PF into Nifty. Risky affair; only if you have risk appetite/capacity and a 5-year-plus horizon. Otherwise don't disturb retirement money.

recommendations.note: Exit on rallies (at ~43% loss); near 52-week low, hit by Gulf war, weak last-quarter result; sell into a rally to 260-280.
recommendations.detail: Near 52-week low; one of the stocks affected by the Gulf war; last quarter result weak. Better to exit on rallies - maybe one small rally to 260-280 on the cards; sell when it reaches there.
